title: Software Update - DFU - HS low battery: multiple clicks on buttons
scenario: DFU should be blocked when headset battery is below 5%, and rapid button clicks should not crash the app or dialog.
steps: Ensure the headset battery is below 5% and not plugged into power.
Attempt to enter DFU mode on the headset.
Rapidly click on buttons such as Update, Continue, Start, and OK in quick succession.
Observe the behavior of the app and any dialogs.
expected: DFU mode should not be possible. The app and dialogs should not crash or break despite rapid clicking.
